Class BaseSoundSource<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.audio.impl.BaseSoundSource<SELF>
Type Parameters:
SELF - the type of this sound buffer
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, SoundInstance<SELF>, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
StaticSoundSource, StreamingSoundSource
public abstract class BaseSoundSource<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>> extends Object implements NonThrowingAutoCloseable, SoundInstance<SELF>
Base interface for managing OpenAL sound sources.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    BaseSoundSource.SourceState
    Enum class representing an OpenAL sound source state.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface SoundInstance

    SoundInstance.State

    Returns a float array with length 3, where the 0th element represents the X position of this sound source, the 1st element represents the Y position of this sound source and the 2nd element represents the Z position of this sound source.

    Sets the position for this sound source (relative to the listener's position).

    Returns the OpenAL source state of this source.
    SoundInstance.State
    getState()
    Returns the current state of this sound.
    void
    pause()
    If the state of this source is playing, sets it to paused, otherwise does nothing.
    void
    play()
    If the state of this source is stopped, firstly sets it to initial, then to playing.
    void
    rewind()
    If the state of this source is already initial, does nothing.
    protected abstract SELF
    self()
    This method must return this sound source.
    void
    stop()
    If the state of this source is initial or stopped, does nothing, otherwise sets the state of this source to stopped.
    void

  • Field Details

    • alcContext

      protected final long alcContext
      The ALC context handle.

    • sourceId

      protected final int sourceId
      The OpenAL source ID.

    • attachedEffects

      protected EffectMap<? super SoundEffect> attachedEffects
      The attached sound effect map that will be listened. Ignored if null.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseSoundSource

      protected BaseSoundSource(long alcContext, int sourceId)
      Constructor for subclasses to call.

  • Method Details

    • self

      protected abstract SELF self()
      This method must return this sound source.
      Returns:
      this sound source

    • play

      public void play()
      If the state of this source is stopped, firstly sets it to initial, then to playing. Otherwise, if the state is not already playing, sets it to playing.

      If the state was paused, the source is resumed, i.e. starts playing from the current sampling offset. Otherwise, the source starts playing from the beginning.

      Specified by:
      play in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>

    • pause

      public void pause()
      If the state of this source is playing, sets it to paused, otherwise does nothing.
      Specified by:
      pause in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>

    • stop

      public void stop()
      If the state of this source is initial or stopped, does nothing, otherwise sets the state of this source to stopped.
      Specified by:
      stop in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>

    • rewind

      public void rewind()
      If the state of this source is already initial, does nothing. If the state is playing or paused, firstly stops this source, then sets the state to initial. If the state is stopped, just sets the state to initial.
      Specified by:
      rewind in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>

    • getALState

      public BaseSoundSource.SourceState getALState()
      Returns the OpenAL source state of this source.
      Returns:
      the source state

    • getState

      public SoundInstance.State getState()
      Returns the current state of this sound.
      Specified by:
      getState in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>
      Returns:
      the current state

    • alPitch

      public SELF alPitch(float newPitch)
      Sets the pitch for this sound source.
      Parameters:
      newPitch - the new pitch
      Returns:
      this sound source

    • alGain

      public SELF alGain(float newGain)
      Sets the gain for this sound source.
      Parameters:
      newGain - the new gain
      Returns:
      this sound source

    • alPosition

      public SELF alPosition(float x, float y, float z)
      Sets the position for this sound source (relative to the listener's position).
      Parameters:
      x - the X coordinate
      y - the Y coordinate
      z - the Z coordinate
      Returns:
      this sound source

    • effect

      public SELF effect(SoundEffect effect, double value)
      Sets the given effect to the given value, which is normalized according to the given effect's rules.
      Specified by:
      effect in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>
      Parameters:
      effect - the effect
      value - the new value
      Returns:
      this sound instance

    • effect

      public double effect(SoundEffect effect)
      Returns the given effect's value for this sound.
      Specified by:
      effect in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>
      Parameters:
      effect - the effect
      Returns:
      the effect's value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the effect is null

    • copyPropertiesFrom

      public SELF copyPropertiesFrom(EffectMap<? super SoundEffect> soundEffects)
      Copies the sound effects to this sound.
      Specified by:
      copyPropertiesFrom in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>
      Parameters:
      soundEffects - the sound effects to copy
      Returns:
      this sound instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the given sound effect map is null

    • attachProperties

      public SELF attachProperties(EffectMap<? super SoundEffect> soundEffects)
      Attaches the sound effects to this sound. The values from this map will be copied to this sound constantly.
      Specified by:
      attachProperties in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>
      Parameters:
      soundEffects - the sound effect map to listen to
      Returns:
      this sound instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the given sound effect map is null

    • detachProperties

      public SELF detachProperties()
      Detaches the sound effects from this sound. The properties of this sound will no longer be constantly changing after calling this method.
      Specified by:
      detachProperties in interface SoundInstance<SELF extends BaseSoundSource<SELF>>
      Returns:
      this sound instance

    • alPitch

      public float alPitch()
      Returns the pitch of this sound source.
      Returns:
      the pitch of this sound source

    • alGain

      public float alGain()
      Returns the gain of this sound source.
      Returns:
      the gain of this sound source

    • alPosition

      public float[] alPosition()
      Returns a float array with length 3, where the 0th element represents the X position of this sound source, the 1st element represents the Y position of this sound source and the 2nd element represents the Z position of this sound source. Changing the contents of the array will not affect this sound source.
      Returns:
      the position of this sound source

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Ticks this source. This method is executed repeatedly for each playing sound source in the audio engine loop.

    • close

      public abstract void close()
      Destroys this sound source and releases all associated resources. The sound source should not be able to be used after calling this method. Calling this method more than once should not have any effect.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface NonThrowingAutoCloseable
